notes: Majestic Dawn (dp5), 100-card set, Diamond & Pearl era. NO secret rares (set has no secret-rare bucket); 4 Lv.X (Garchomp, Glaceon, Leafeon, Porygon-Z) per Bulbapedia Majestic Dawn page. Pack = 10 cards: ~5 common, 3 uncommon, 1 reverse holo, 1 guaranteed rare-or-better (Bulbapedia booster-pack page; every DP-era intl booster guarantees >=1 rare). Box = 36, no ETB (vintage product). Rare slot: Lv.X published rate ~1:36 packs (Flipside rarity review; "1:36 for first DP-era sets") => lv-x=0.028 of rare slots. Remaining ~0.972 split between non-holo rare and rare-holo, weighted ~2:1 non-holo:holo consistent with DP-era ~10-12 holos/box and the set's 20 rare vs 14 rare-holo counts => rare 0.660, rare-holo 0.312. Reverse-holo slot drawn from the reversible pool (commons/uncommons/rares/holo-rares, excludes Lv.X); distributed proportional to bucket counts in that 96-card pool: common 32, uncommon 30, rare 20, rare-holo 14. Confidence LOW: no per-set opened-box study sourceable; rates are era-average mapped onto this set's published composition. Lv.X rate is the only firmly published figure. Vintage sealed box carries large collector premium, so EV/booster will sit well below box price - expected, not a rate error.
